name: Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working as expected

labels: bug
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- OS: <!-- e.g. Windows 11 / macOS 14 / Ubuntu 24.04 -->
- Bun version: <!-- bun --version -->
- Browser: <!-- e.g. Chrome 138, Safari 17 -->
- Deployment: <!-- local dev / self-hosted -->

## Logs / screenshots

Paste relevant console or server logs, and screenshots if applicable.
